data_description.host: Local IP address of the ER605 (e.g. 192.168.0.1)

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate TP-Link ER605
reauth_confirm.description: The credentials for {host} are no longer valid. Enter new credentials.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the router. Check the IP address and that the router is online.

error.invalid_interval: Value must be 0 (disabled) or at least 5.

data_description.poll_interval: Tier 1 — CPU, memory, traffic rates, port state (5–300 s, default 5). Set to 0 to disable automatic polling.
data_description.medium_poll_interval: Tier 2 — IP addresses, gateway, DNS, IPv6, uptime (5–300 s, default 30). Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.ipstats_poll_interval: Tier 3 — Per-IP client analytics (5–86 400 s, default 150). Set to 0 to disable.
